issues.message: Programming profile "code-family" includes a multi-line code example but does not explain it step by step or line by line in sketchBlocks.

Try It exercise "try-configure-and-initialize-a-repository-sketch0" reproduces the worked example in "Configuring User Identity in Git" (configure-and-initialize-a-repository-sketch0) through solutionCode. Change a meaningful expectation such as the requested output, source entity, filter, aggregate, input, inserted/updated values, or relationship path. Formatting, capitalization, aliases, and ORDER BY alone do not make it a different exercise.

Formatting, capitalization, aliases, and ORDER BY alone do not make it a different exercise.
